text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally, the curtain rises for the spring Tenno
Sho—the showdown between Narita Brian and
Rice Shower, the Sable Assassin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower seems frail at a glance, but a strong
will lies hidden within. Despite being called "the
Assassin" and treated like a villain, she doesn't
run away from a race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling respect for her resilience, Narita Brian
puts her entire body and soul into their
competition.
